form.formComment: Returns to racing after a spell of four months. Well beaten at the end of his last preparation at this course and distance when seventh at very long odds behind L'ecrin D'or. Hasn't won for 20 months, so it's hard to be over-confident.

form.formComment: Last start disqualified at this track on March 21 over 2850m. Before that, 4th over 2700m at this track, beaten 8.4m by L'as Desbois in 5yo G2 fillies restricted race on February 8 at $30. One of the better hopes.

form.formComment: Last start 10th (25m) over 2450m at Caen beaten 40m by Force Of Nature in 5yo handicap euro open restricted race on March 9 at $93. Two runs back won by 1.3m at this track beating Ludivine in 5yo euro open restricted race on January 14 at $9.60. Not doing enough.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 6th (25m) over 2450m at Caen beaten 14m by Force Of Nature in 5yo handicap euro open restricted race on March 9 at $16. Showed ability the race before when he won by 4.1m at this track beating Ludivine in 5yo race on January 31 at $4.70. Right in the mix.

form.formComment: Returns from the paddock. At the latest first-up run 3rd over 2700m at this track, beaten 2.6m by Luciano Menuet in 3yo G2 fillies restricted race on May 10 2024 at $22. Might be better for this run.
